translation.hoverDrag: Hover and drag any hand to explore how time works!
translation.guideSubtitle: Here is how to use the Time Learning Clock:
translation.guideStep1Desc: Grab the hand on the Second, Minute, or Hour dials and spin them around.
translation.guideStep2Desc: Watch how moving the minutes automatically moves the hours, just like a real clock!
translation.guideStep3Desc: Click 'Start Practice Mode' to get a random target time and test your new skills.
